arts.ttl: Golden Boy 2024: Two Juventus players among finalists
arts.sum: The prestigious Golden Boy award, established by Italian newspaper Tuttosport to recognize the best under-21 footballer in Europe, has unveiled its list of 25 finalists for the 2024 edition. Among the talented young players vying for the honor are two Juventus stars: Kenan Yildiz and Samuel Mbangula. This year’s list features an impressive array of rising talents from top clubs across Europe. Barcelona’s Lamine Yamal is considered a strong favorite after his outstanding performances for both club and country. arts.ttl: Cambiaso: “Juventus is my Real Madrid, Thiago Motta is a visionary”
arts.sum: Juventus defender Andrea Cambiaso played down links with Real Madrid, insisting he is committed to the Bianconeri. Following excellent performances with the national team, he recently gave an extensive interview to Corriere dello Sport. Reflecting on his journey, Cambiaso said, “Gatti and I are survivors, starting from amateur leagues and making it to Juve. I feel fortunate every day I open my eyes. I’m hungry and eager to succeed. When I think about the road I’ve traveled and where I am today, it makes my head spin. So I prefer to keep running. arts.ttl: Danilo Asks for Peculiar Tweak of His Juventus Contract
arts.sum: Danilo wants Juventus to remove a clause to automatically renew his contract if he plays in 50 percent of the matches this season. His deal expires in June 2025 but with that caveat.
